mapper.select: SELECT * FROM product WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0 AND status = 1
SELECT * FROM product WHERE ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT * FROM product WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND status = 1 AND recommended = 1 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product(store_id, category_id, name, main_image, images, description, status, recommended, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{storeId}, #{categoryId}, #{name}, #{mainImage}, #{images}, #{description}, #{status}, #{recommended}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE product SET category_id = #{categoryId}, name = #{name}, main_image = #{mainImage}, images = #{images}, description = #{description}, recommended = #{recommended}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE product SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
